description: 东方哲学派。技术是思考的媒介。柔和科技感，概念原型图作为核心视觉。
base_style_prompt: Warm gray background (#F5F3EF). Soft shadows (blur 20px+). Rounded corners (16px+). Concept diagrams as core visual. Flowcharts as art. Soft gradients. Hand-drawn style icons. Card-based layout. Thoughtful technology aesthetics — not aggressive, not playful.
path_note: Path A exclusive (HTML→PPTX). Soft shadow and card effects require CSS control.
philosophy: 技术是思考的媒介。用柔和的科技感和概念原型图传达深度思考。
